notes: Single source of truth for V1 monolithic preset key migration buckets. Read by `_rollout.py` + `audit_v1_migration.py`. Tombstone bucket initially empty; populated per-incident via `sndr_private/planning/incidents/`.

a5000-2x-27b-int4-tq-k8v4.rationale: Direct match — V2 preset composes identical config (TQ k8v4 + MTP K=3 single-stream).

a5000-2x-35b-prod.rationale: Direct match — V2 preset composes identical config (FP8 + TQ k8v4 + MTP K=3 balanced).

a5000-1x-tier-aware-pn95.rationale: PN95 tier-aware was experimental; closest V2 alias is the single-3090 example preset (different hardware but same concept).

a5000-2x-tier-aware-example.rationale: `-example` suffix marks non-prod; direct V2 migration to the example namespace.
